mapper.insert: INSERT INTO properties ( property_identity_hash, region_code, region_name, sigungu, property_name, property_type, lot_number, main_number, sub_number, road_name, built_year, min_exclusive_area, max_exclusive_area, min_contract_area, max_contract_area, min_deposit_amount, max_deposit_amount, min_monthly_rent_amount, max_monthly_rent_amount, min_trade_amount, max_trade_amount, first_contract_date, latest_contract_date, trade_count ) SELECT SHA2(CONCAT_WS('|', ld.code, COALESCE(t.property_type, ''), COALESCE(t.property_name, ''), COALESCE(t.lot_number, ''), COALESCE(t.main_number, ''), COALESCE(t.sub_number, ''), COALESCE(t.road_name, '') ), 256) AS property_identity_hash, ld.code AS region_code, ld.name AS region_name, t.sigungu, NULLIF(TRIM(t.property_name), '') AS property_name, NULLIF(TRIM(t.property_type), '') AS property_type, NULLIF(TRIM(t.lot_number), '') AS lot_number, NULLIF(TRIM(t.main_number), '') AS main_number, NULLIF(TRIM(t.sub_number), '') AS sub_number, NULLIF(TRIM(t.road_name), '') AS road_name, MAX(t.built_year) AS built_year, MIN(t.exclusive_area) AS min_exclusive_area, MAX(t.exclusive_area) AS max_exclusive_area, MIN(t.contract_area) AS min_contract_area, MAX(t.contract_area) AS max_contract_area, MIN(t.deposit_amount) AS min_deposit_amount, MAX(t.deposit_amount) AS max_deposit_amount, MIN(t.monthly_rent_amount) AS min_monthly_rent_amount, MAX(t.monthly_rent_amount) AS max_monthly_rent_amount, MIN(t.trade_amount) AS min_trade_amount, MAX(t.trade_amount) AS max_trade_amount, MIN(t.contract_date) AS first_contract_date, MAX(t.contract_date) AS latest_contract_date, COUNT(*) AS trade_count FROM real_estate_trades t JOIN legal_dongs ld ON ld.name = t.sigungu AND ld.is_active = 1 GROUP BY ld.code, ld.name, t.sigungu, t.property_type, t.property_name, t.lot_number, t.main_number, t.sub_number, t.road_name ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE region_code = VALUES(region_code), region_name = VALUES(region_name), sigungu = VALUES(sigungu), property_name = VALUES(property_name), property_type = VALUES(property_type), lot_number = VALUES(lot_number), main_number = VALUES(main_number), sub_number = VALUES(sub_number), road_name = VALUES(road_name), built_year = VALUES(built_year), min_exclusive_area = VALUES(min_exclusive_area), max_exclusive_area = VALUES(max_exclusive_area), min_contract_area = VALUES(min_contract_area), max_contract_area = VALUES(max_contract_area), min_deposit_amount = VALUES(min_deposit_amount), max_deposit_amount = VALUES(max_deposit_amount), min_monthly_rent_amount = VALUES(min_monthly_rent_amount), max_monthly_rent_amount = VALUES(max_monthly_rent_amount), min_trade_amount = VALUES(min_trade_amount), max_trade_amount = VALUES(max_trade_amount), first_contract_date = VALUES(first_contract_date), latest_contract_date = VALUES(latest_contract_date), trade_count = VALUES(trade_count), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, region_name, sigungu, property_name, road_name, lot_number FROM properties WHERE latitude IS NULL OR longitude IS NULL OR location IS NULL ORDER BY id LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE properties SET latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, location = ST_SRID(POINT(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
